rulings.Case Title: HENRY WONG VS. LOLITA SWEET et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 18, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANT LOLITA SWEET's Motion To Withdraw "Deemed Admissions" DENIED. Defendant failed to show suspire, mistake or excusable neglect justifying failure to respond to 25 requests for admission and motion to deem admissions admitted for three and a half months while otherwise participating in the litigation. Additionally, if this motion is granted Plaintiff will be prejudiced in light of September 2, 2014 trail date and upcoming discovery cut off. = (501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: JOVICA MAKSIMOVIC et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. RECONTRUST et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 18, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANTs BANK OF AMERICA N.A., RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A. and THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurer is sustained without leave to amend as to the first and third cause of action. Plaintiff fails to allege a cause of action for breach of contract or promissory estoppel. See Exhibits to Complaint. Dodd v. Citizens Bank of Costs Mesa (1990) 222 Cal.App.1624. Plaintiff does not have standing to assert cancellation of instruments cause of action. Keshtgar v. U.S. Bank (2014) 226 Cal.App.4th 1201. Demurer to wrongful foreclosure cause of action is overruled, Plaintiff sufficiently alleged foreclosure in violation of Court's order and damages incurred as a result of such foreclosure before the rescission. = (501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: RISA CORWIN et al VS. MICHAEL SPAIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing Of Defendant Michael Spain'S Motion To Compel Bridget Mckenna, Ph.D To Comply With Subpoena For Business Records And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 18, 2014, line 4. Defendant Michael Spain's Motion To Compel Bridget Mckenna, Ph.D To Comply With Subpoena For Business Records And Request For Monetary Sanctions DENIED. Dr. Bridget McKenna has executed an Affidavit of No records on April 28, 2014 and an Affidavit of Custodian of Records on May 1, 2014. Defendant's Request for sanctions is DENIED. = (501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: LENA SURJADI VS. TALIA BEAUMONT et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, July 18, 2014, line 7. DEFENDANTs TALIA BEAUMONT and ROBIN SCHMIDT's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action under CCP 1161(4) and the Notice satisfies the requirements of SFRO 37.9(a)(3). = (501/LKS)
